class.name: AbilitySystemCueSpec
class.description:
[AbilitySystemCueSpec] is the runtime wrapper for [AbilitySystemCue], analogous to [AbilitySystemEffectSpec] for [AbilitySystemEffect] and [AbilitySystemAbilitySpec] for [AbilitySystemAbility].
It is created automatically by [AbilitySystemComponent] whenever a cue is triggered — either from [method AbilitySystemComponent.execute_cue] (manual/lightweight) or from [method AbilitySystemComponent.apply_effect_spec_to_self] (rich, including the source [AbilitySystemEffectSpec] and pre-calculated magnitude).
The spec is passed to the Cue's GDVirtual callbacks ([code]_on_execute[/code], [code]_on_active[/code], [code]_on_remove[/code]) so the script can inspect the full execution context without needing global state.
[b]Example (GDScript):[/b] [codeblock] extends AbilitySystemCue
func _on_execute(spec: AbilitySystemCueSpec): var damage = spec.magnitude var attacker = spec.source_asc # Spawn floating damage number at attacker's position, etc. print("Cue triggered! Damage = ", damage) [/codeblock]

method.name: get_source_asc
method.description: Returns the source AbilitySystemComponent that triggered this cue.

method.name: get_target_asc
method.description: Returns the target AbilitySystemComponent receiving this cue.

members.member: The [AbilitySystemEffectSpec] that triggered this cue, if any. Will be [code]null[/code] when the cue was dispatched manually via [method AbilitySystemComponent.execute_cue].
Arbitrary extra data passed at the call site via [method AbilitySystemComponent.execute_cue].
Pre-calculated total magnitude from the triggering effect (sum of all modifier magnitudes). Zero when no effect is involved.
